text.zh: StyleGAN 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: StyleGAN is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: StyleGAN 围绕学习得到的风格空间重新设计 GAN 生成器，用风格调制合成层。该架构生成了高质量人脸，也让潜空间编辑更容易解释。
text.en: StyleGAN redesigned the GAN generator around a learned style space that modulates synthesis layers. The architecture produced high-quality faces and made latent-space editing more interpretable.
